docket_entries.description: AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $4,500.00 FILED BY JIMENEZ GUADALUPE HERNANDEZ JUAN M AS TO DEFENDANT WILLIAMS ETZEL FLEETS SR BODDIE RONALD EUGENE ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUN-20-1991 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 06
SUBSTITUTED PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT BODDIE RONALD EUGENE

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF JIMENEZ GUADALUPE HERNANDEZ JUAN M RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT BODDIE RONALD EUGENE $1,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $28.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,028.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
NOTICE OF JUDGMENT TO DEFEND. RETURNED. UNABLE TO FORWARD.
